experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Worked as a Frontend Developer on the Cinservice Single Family Activation platform, responsible for building and enhancing multiple core modules using Next.js.

Contributed to the development and maintenance of key features including Locations, Cases & Tasks, Company Management, and other operational modules. Implemented several performance optimizations, especially for listing views, improving load time, rendering efficiency, and overall user experience.

Collaborated closely with backend and product teams to integrate APIs, handle complex data flows, and deliver scalable, user-friendly interfaces. Also involved in fixing production issues, improving UI consistency, and adding new functionalities based on business requirements.
Implemented reusable components and common UI patterns, improving code maintainability and reducing duplication across modules.
Actively participated in feature enhancements, bug fixing, and code reviews, ensuring stable releases and better overall application quality.

experience.title: Associate React.js Developer
bullets: Worked as part of the frontend team on multiple core modules, including Project Management, Recruitment, Payroll, CRM, People and Support.
Took key responsibility in developing and maintaining features for the Project Management, Support Ticket, and Reports modules.

Worked extensively on Task management features in Project Management enhancing features like task timer tracking and status updates, while also designing and developing several new features to improve workflows.

Restructured the entire Reports module to improve flexibility and reusability also developed numerous complex reports from scratch, focusing on dynamic data visualization and user friendly interfaces.
Built and optimized reusable React components to maintain a consistent UI and accelerate development across the platform.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - BTech, Computer Science
